reviews.review_description: Nothing like the description just don’t buy this game terrible graphics and the game only last for 2 min

So it’s advertised as a high cold hunting day  but it isn’t and it’s as$



￼

developer_response.body: We appreciate your feedback and are truly sorry to hear that you found the game disappointing. Our goal is to provide an enjoyable experience, and it seems we fell short. We’d love to understand more about your concerns and how we can improve. Please feel free to share specific issues or suggestions. Your input is important to us, and we’re committed to making the game better for everyone.
